---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new module, widget, configuration option, or improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

<!--
  Before opening a feature request, please:
  - Search existing issues and discussions for prior proposals
  - Consider whether the feature belongs in the shell config itself
    or in the upstream QuickShell toolkit
-->

<!-- For security-sensitive feature requests (e.g., cryptographic, privilege changes), consider opening a private discussion or following the Security Policy in SECURITY.md. -->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing the feature. -->

## Motivation

<!--
  What problem does this solve, or what use case does it enable?
  Explain why the current behaviour is insufficient.
  e.g. "There is no way to configure the bar height via shell.json
        without editing QML directly, which breaks on config reloads."
-->

## Proposed Solution

<!--
  Describe how you imagine this feature working.
  Be specific about:
  - Which module or component is affected (bar, control-center, dashboard, OSD, services...)
  - How it would be exposed to users (new shell.json key, new QML component, service hook...)
  - Expected behaviour and any edge cases
-->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you tried a workaround? Why does it fall short? -->

## Affected Area

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] Bar / Status bar
- [ ] Control Center
- [ ] Dashboard
- [ ] Launcher
- [ ] Notifications / OSD
- [ ] Theming / pywal integration
- [ ] Services (audio, network, Bluetooth, battery)
- [ ] shell.json configuration API
- [ ] setup.sh / installation
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## References

<!--
  Links to similar implementations in other shells, upstream QuickShell issues,
  prior discussions, or relevant documentation.
-->

## Additional Context

<!-- Anything else that supports this proposal. -->
